craigslist.title: A higher quality of living.
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 90 F Street, Martinez, CA 94553 Martinez, California is known as a small town with a big heart! For Active Adults 55 & over, Martinez Hillside is the perfect fit for you! Located on a desirable cul-de-sac in a residential neighborhood you'll find a charming community. You will love our well-equipped one and two-bedroom apartments, featuring a large kitchen, a welcoming living area, and great closet space. Entertain in our picnic and barbecue area with a gorgeous view of the rolling hillside, or relax in our resident clubhouse with a good book. Everything you want is just outside your door. Downtown Martinez was revitalized while preserving the historic value of the community. Enjoy antique shops, darling boutiques, and lots of dining options close to your home. The ultimate Northern California lifestyle is waiting for you at Martinez Hillside Senior Apartments. At Martinez Hillside, our floor plans are designed to accommodate your unique lifestyle. The result is a space that feels like home the moment you walk through the door. Each of our comfortable interiors is outfitted with must-have features that streamline your daily routine, and there’s more right outside your front door with our well-curated community amenities. Martinez Hillside offers a prime location in Martinez, California, so you can take advantage of everything the city has to offer. Moments from your location are some of the area’s top restaurants, shopping, employers, and outdoor recreation. Check out our Neighborhood page to learn more about the area surrounding Martinez. Features Include: Energy-Efficient Appliances Air Conditioning Wood Plank Flooring Elevators Fitness Center Sun Deck Call: show contact info For more information, visit us at: https://livegkmanagement.com/6yv5adw6/martinez-hillside Pricing and availability are subject to change daily. craigslist.title: Bright Studio
craigslist.location: 400 Santa Clara Ave. near Lake Park Ave.
craigslist.full_address: 400 Santa Clara Ave. near Lake Park Ave.
craigslist.geocode_query: 400 Santa Clara Ave. near Lake Park Ave.
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Bright studio with HARDWOOD FLOORS is on a first level of a QUIET , 28 unit, early 1920s Spanish Revival building (with ELEVATOR ). Located in the GRAND LAKE THEATRE NEIGHBORHOOD , just 2 blocks from Lake Merritt. Accessible to SHOPPING (Trader Joe’s, Safeway, Walgreens, Ace Hardware, Oakanna), RESTAURANTS & CAFES, PUBLIC TRANSPORTATION SERVICES (AC Transit, BART and RideShare departure locations ) and just around the corner is the Oakland-Grand Lake Farmers Market (Saturdays). SEPARATE KITCHEN which includes a GAS STOVE/OVEN, and FROST-FREE REFRIGERATOR and a small area for dining. A large WALK-IN CLOSET with over-head shelving and built-in dresser as well as an additional SMALL CLOSET for all your storage needs. Windowed bathroom with a shower over full-sized tub. An integrated, SECURE, electronically-coded entry system gives you the option of letting your guests inside conveniently from your phone and a ceiling fan helps complement this charming studio apartment. Included , in the utilities, are GAS, WATER, STEAM HEAT and WASTE/RECYCLING/COMPOST. All you are responsible for is electricity and ISP service ( Sonic Fiber-Optic Cable and/or Xfinity Cable ) if needed. Coin-operated washers and dryers are available 24/7 in the LAUNDRY ROOM. Parking is available on the street. PAID PARKING on property when available with sign-up on Waiting List. This is a minimum of a one (1) year lease which automatically rolls over to a Month-to-Month term after the first year of residency. Your pet is always welcome here. St. Maarten Apts. allows you to provide a safe and secure home for 1 (one) small dog or cat, and the best part of all— no pet deposit required. To submit an application you must bring $45 ( CASH or make a Zelle® transfer ) for a required Credit Report fee (we will gladly accept a current, complete CR you provide in lieu of CR fee). Rank is determined by the order that completed applications are received. Once approved, a Cashier's Check/Money Order/Zelle® transfer must be remitted within 48 hours (2 days) upon receiving acceptance notification in the amount of $3,050 (1st Month’s Rent + Security Deposit). Scheduled appointments can be made preferably by calling/texting show contact info between the hours of 9 a.m. – 8 p.m., Monday thru Saturday. Showings can be made for Sundays by making special arrangements. ST. MAARTEN APARTMENTS is located at 400 Santa Clara Ave., Oakland. Thank you for your consideration and taking interest in ST. MAARTEN APARTMENTS. ** Please note, email inquiries will not be answered at this time. Feel free to call/text further questions and schedule appointments. Please, do not email your requests.**

craigslist.title: Beautifully remodeled 1 BD/1BA (650 SQ FT) Craftsman triplex in Berkeley
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post A Beautifully remodeled 1 BD/1BA (650 SQ FT) Craftsman triplex in Berkeley's vibrant Gilman / Westbrae district. This is the rear unit of a front/back duplex. There is a detached adu in the rear. See floor plan image(1340 unit). No upstairs or downstairs neighbors! The unit features hardwoods, quartz + Maple kitchen counters, gas range, Range hood, fireplace, central heat, washer and dryer, dual pane windows, walk in closet in living room, large hall closet, bedroom closet, keyed gated entry. There is a large living room and dining area. Central heat in the unit with vents in each room. Back yard and Side yard garden area. Very quiet property. The apartment is within 5 minute walking distance to all Gilman district amenities including, to Whole Foods, Berkeley Natural market, Tokyo Fish Market, Philz Coffee, Ashkenaz, Acme Bread, Picante, REI, North Face, Picante, Westbrae Bier Garten, Bartavelle Coffee and Wine bar, Berkeley Bagels, Monterey Market and much more. 14 blocks to North Berkeley Bart. 1 block to rapid bus line. Short Lyft ride or bike ride to campus. Non permit street parking is bountiful. Available August 1, or possibly a little earlier if needed. 1 year lease which becomes month to month after 1 year. Landlord pays garbage only. Move-in cost is 1st months rent + deposit. 1 Year lease which becomes month to month after 1 year. Free onsite laundry.

craigslist.title: Remarkable value. Unbeatable location!
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 90 F Street, Martinez, CA 94553 Martinez, California is known as a small town with a big heart! For Active Adults 55 & over, Martinez Hillside is the perfect fit for you! Located on a desirable cul-de-sac in a residential neighborhood you'll find a charming community. You will love our well-equipped one and two-bedroom apartments, featuring a large kitchen, a welcoming living area, and great closet space. Entertain in our picnic and barbecue area with a gorgeous view of the rolling hillside, or relax in our resident clubhouse with a good book. Everything you want is just outside your door. Downtown Martinez was revitalized while preserving the historic value of the community. Enjoy antique shops, darling boutiques, and lots of dining options close to your home. The ultimate Northern California lifestyle is waiting for you at Martinez Hillside Senior Apartments. At Martinez Hillside, our floor plans are designed to accommodate your unique lifestyle. The result is a space that feels like home the moment you walk through the door. Each of our comfortable interiors is outfitted with must-have features that streamline your daily routine, and there’s more right outside your front door with our well-curated community amenities. Martinez Hillside offers a prime location in Martinez, California, so you can take advantage of everything the city has to offer. Moments from your location are some of the area’s top restaurants, shopping, employers, and outdoor recreation. Check out our Neighborhood page to learn more about the area surrounding Martinez. craigslist.title: Quality living. It starts here!
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 90 F Street, Martinez, CA 94553 Martinez, California is known as a small town with a big heart! For Active Adults 55 & over, Martinez Hillside is the perfect fit for you! Located on a desirable cul-de-sac in a residential neighborhood you'll find a charming community. You will love our well-equipped one and two-bedroom apartments, featuring a large kitchen, a welcoming living area, and great closet space. Entertain in our picnic and barbecue area with a gorgeous view of the rolling hillside, or relax in our resident clubhouse with a good book. Everything you want is just outside your door. Downtown Martinez was revitalized while preserving the historic value of the community. Enjoy antique shops, darling boutiques, and lots of dining options close to your home. The ultimate Northern California lifestyle is waiting for you at Martinez Hillside Senior Apartments. At Martinez Hillside, our floor plans are designed to accommodate your unique lifestyle. The result is a space that feels like home the moment you walk through the door. Each of our comfortable interiors is outfitted with must-have features that streamline your daily routine, and there’s more right outside your front door with our well-curated community amenities. Martinez Hillside offers a prime location in Martinez, California, so you can take advantage of everything the city has to offer. Moments from your location are some of the area’s top restaurants, shopping, employers, and outdoor recreation. Check out our Neighborhood page to learn more about the area surrounding Martinez. Features Include: Wood Plank Flooring Elevators Energy-Efficient Appliances Air Conditioning Sun Deck Fitness Center Call: show contact info For more information, visit us at: https://livegkmanagement.com/3xnomp2t/martinez-hillside Pricing and availability are subject to change daily. craigslist.title: Experience 1Bedroom Apartment in Lower Pacific Heights
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post First time on the market since 1982! Unique opportunity to put your own stamp on this classic San Francisco home. Experience the quintessential San Francisco lifestyle in this grand top-floor residence situated in an elegant three-unit Edwardian building. Built in 1900, this full-floor condominium preserves the sophisticated scale and architectural integrity of the era while offering the expansive proportions of a modern home, accented by custom stained glass windows paying homage to the modern era of technology. Interested renters can message their phone number anytime.

craigslist.title: Stylish 1BR, 1BA in a Prime Russian Hill Location
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Improvement Perched in one of the city's most enchanting neighborhoods, this magical tri-level home offers 1 bedrooms, 1 baths, and a lifestyle straight out of a postcard. Step inside to a sun-kissed living room with original period windows and a brick fireplace, the kind of cozy space made for morning coffee, evening wine, and conversations that linger late into the night. Just off the living room sits a dreamy bedroom or the perfect home office for your inspired moments. Down the hallway, a charming bedroom with built-ins and a classic split bath leads you to the heart of the home, an inviting eat-in kitchen framed by dramatic picture windows and sweeping southern views that sparkle from sunrise to city lights. It's an invitation to linger, sip a glass of wine, drink your morning coffee and watch the fog roll in, and feel the city's heartbeat just outside your window. The 2nd lower level offers a quiet suite and bath with direct access to the garage and At the garden level. Interested renters can message their phone number anytime.

craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post reply to Eric . Eng @ propsci . com occupied today, coming middle July. Please don't disturb residents. Status/ availability of a property can change daily and hourly. Availability cannot be guaranteed as applications are submitted, processed and approved. PROPERTY: - Property type: apartment. - Bedrooms: one bedroom. - Baths: one bathroom. - Unit size: approximately 700 square feet. - Yard: none - Car parking: garage spaces extra charge. - Ceiling height: 8 feet approx. - Flooring: hardwood, porcelain, ceramic tiles, and carpet. - Windows: original wood sash, single pane, double hung. - Kitchen: gas stove and refrigerator supplied. - Unit: top floor, at back of building. - Location: second floor, up a staircase. - Laundry: shared clothes washer/dryer machines, coin operated. - No pets such as animals, dogs, cats, birds, turtles, frogs, or snakes allowed. - Kitchen: 16 feet by 8 feet. - Bedroom: 11 feet by 9 feet. - Living room: 15 feet by 11 feet. - Bathroom: 7 feet by 7 feet. - Closets: 3, one is large walk-in layout. RENTAL REQUIREMENTS: - All utilities paid by tenants. - Excellent credit history/score. - Minimum $6,000 monthly income, verifiable. - Free applications, if you provide your credit report and paycheck stub. - Upon approval of application, deposit must be paid within 3 days and lease signed with rent paid by 3 days. - Rental references needed. Will interview current/prior landlords. - Tenants must purchase renter’s insurance policy. - Move-in costs: first month's rent plus security deposit. - No prior evictions, pending evictions, or near-evictions situations. - No lawsuits, arbitrations, settlements, or disputes with landlords. - No pets such as animals, dogs, cats, birds, turtles, frogs, or snakes. - For prior 3 months, show proof of timely rent payment (i.e. canceled checks). - One year lease duration. Premium rates for shorter terms. - Financially ready to move? In your bank, you should have enough funds to cover security deposit, moving costs, utilities, and two months rent. - No smoking indoors, please. Not all applicants will qualify. You should review your own financial situation, PLEASE. The FICO company has the following categories: 580 to 669 Fair credit. 670 to 739 Good credit. 740 to 799 Very Good credit. 800 to 850 Exceptional credit. 31 Oakes Blvd, San Leandro, near east 14th St.

craigslist.title: Beautiful 3BR/2BA Townhouse at Eco-Friendly Arterra in Mission Bay!
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post *Available now *1 year lease *Rent: $6,500. Security deposit: $6,500 *Rent includes 1-car garage parking, water, gas and trash. Tenant is responsible for other utilities. *Tenant to abide by HOA rules and regulations, a copy will be provided. *No smoking. Cat OK. *$200 move-in fee to be paid to HOA The Home: This spacious, privately owned townhouse offers 1,278 square feet of living space. With 3 bedrooms and 2 full bathrooms, it provides plenty of room to live, work, and relax. You will love the airy, open feel created by the soaring 10-foot ceilings, complemented beautifully by sleek engineered hardwood flooring that flows seamlessly throughout the entire unit. The Building & Amenities: Arterra is a premier full-service, eco-conscious community designed to elevate your lifestyle. Residents enjoy fantastic amenities, including: 24/7 front desk attendant State-of-the-art fitness center Panoramic rooftop deck with BBQ grills Community herb garden and resident art gallery An exclusive guest "eco-suite" for your visiting friends and family Regular community events to mingle with neighbors The Neighborhood: The location in the heart of Mission Bay is truly unbeatable—ideal for chic urban living. You are perfectly positioned just a short stroll from Mission Creek Park, Oracle Park (go Giants!), local tennis and volleyball courts, and the UCSF campus. It is also an absolute commuter’s dream: you're just one block from Caltrain, close to multiple MUNI lines, and have lightning-fast access to the 101 and 280 freeways. For your daily needs and entertainment, you are surrounded by fantastic shopping and dining options, including Spark Social, Gus's Community Market, Safeway, Philz Coffee, and countless other local favorites.

house_ger.name: San Leandro, Mulford Gardens, newly remodeled 2BR/2BA + office den...
house_ger.msg: QR Code Link to This Post Location: This 2086 Arctic St @ Yukon, San Leandro unit is in the Mullford Gardens, Little Alaska neighborhood. One block to Garfield Elementary, and 5 minutes to San Leandro Marina. This is not a whole house-for-rent situation. The premise is a newer constructed, 1,050 sq. ft., 2-level, and 2BR/2BA plus a bonus room (can be used as a storage, office, etc.) unit to share a beautiful multi-family property with the owner and her family — separate entrance and privacy. The premises consist of two levels. The first level includes a spacious living room, an open kitchen, a full bathroom with shower, and a bedroom. The second level has a city view and consists of one bedroom, a full bath and the bonus room. All rooms have newer A/C and heating. Newer kitchen appliances and newer bathroom amenities. A detached covered laundry (with hookup only) and storage shed in the backyard. One off-street parking space in front of the garage is included with rent. Abundant street parking is available around the neighborhood. We seek nice and quiet, cooperative, and financially responsible candidates. No pet and no smoking. One-year lease. Tenants pay all utilities. Available now and shown by appointment only. The asking rent is $2,600. The security deposit is one month's rent. For viewing and questions, please email, call, or text Stephen @ show contact info to schedule. Thank you.

craigslist.title: Near Piedmont, Kaiser, 1BR/1BA with parking for rent...
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Address: 184 Moss Way, Unit #B, Oakland. Very convenient location: It is steps away from Piedmont Avenue, where you have access to a range of conveniences, including Fenton's ice cream restaurant, a cinema, and a church, among others. Snow White preschool is just around the corner at Moss Way and Leighton. Kaiser Permanente, AC Transit (#57, #657, #653, and #658), and the freeway entrance are just a few blocks away. The nearest Bart station is Macarthur, about 1 mile away (take a shuttle bus from Kaiser to 555-40th Street). The unit is on the ground level of a 3-unit building. All current residents are nice and quiet; we want to maintain that atmosphere. The unit features a dining and living combo area, a kitchen, one bedroom, and a bathroom. The premises have recently been remodeled, with a newer laminated floor throughout. There is no unit above #B, so you don't need to worry about foot traffic upstairs. A portable unit washer and dryer are included with the rent. The owner pays for water and garbage. Rent includes one covered carport parking. No pets and no smoking. One-year lease. The premises are in excellent condition and clean. We're looking for a quiet, low-maintenance, financially responsible tenant(s) who pays rent on time. Available for viewing on or after June 8, by appointment only. Please email, call, or text Stephen at show contact info to schedule. The asking rent is $1,910, and the security deposit is one month's rent. Thank you.

craigslist.title: Townhouse-Style 2BR/1.5BA – 0.8 Mi to Bay Fair BART! Parking Incl.
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Townhouse-Style 2BR/1.5BA – 0.8 Mi to Bay Fair BART! Parking Incl. 1650 159th street, 7, san leandro, CA 94578 2490.00 / Month 2 BEDROOMS | 1.5 BATHROOMS Interested? Fill out this form : https://renter.turbotenant.com/general-prescreener/T3duZXI6MTAwNjA4MQ==?property=2470321&source=cl Have questions? Contact the Landlord : https://rental.turbotenant.com/p/1650-159th-street-san-leandro-ca-unit-7/035d33ba-2fdd-43de-a301-c4f330ec8650?source=craigslist Property Description: Commuter’s dream! This bright, two-story townhouse-style home sits exactly 0.8 miles from the Bay Fair BART station, putting downtown San Francisco just 35 minutes away. Located in a quiet pocket with instant access to I-580, I-238, and I-880, this property offers maximum space and accessibility in the heart of the East Bay. Vouchers / Section 8 are welcome! This apartment boasts two spacious bedrooms, a 1/2 bath on the first floor and a a full bathroom on the second floor, making it an ideal space for comfortable living. The unit has been recently updated with fresh paint, new floorings, and new carpet upstairs, giving it a fresh and modern feel. The private patio off the back offers a perfect spot for relaxation or entertaining. The large shared front yard adds to the appeal of this property, providing ample outdoor space. This apartment is a must-see to truly appreciate its charm and the quality of the finishes. Come and experience the perfect blend of comfort and style in this San Leandro gem. BART Access: 15-minute walk or 3-minute drive to Bay Fair BART Station. Shopping & Dining: Less than 5 minutes to Bayfair Center (Target, Kohl's, Bed Bath & Beyond, movie theater) and local grocery stores. Healthcare: Minutes away from the Kaiser Permanente San Leandro Medical Center. Schools: Located within the San Lorenzo Unified School District footprint. Some photographs in this listing have been virtually staged with furniture using AI. craigslist.title: Spacious 1BR/1BA Apartment in Nob Hill
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 815 O'Farrell Street is a 44 unit mixed-use building. This prominent asset sits at the corner of O'Farrell and Larkin at the edge of San Francisco's Tenderloin neighborhood near Van Ness Avenue and Nob Hill. The property consists of 42 apartments (40 studios, a 1bd and a 2bd), and two large retail spaces with bonus basement space. Through the front doors you enter into a spacious lobby with hardwood floors, high ceilings, and period details. Many of the apartments have been remodeled in the recent past. The residential units are almost fully occupied. The building is fully detached on three sides, providing ample natural light to all levels. The main electrical has been upgraded and indicates 600 amps of service. Heat is supplied through individual wall heaters, helping to keep operating expenses low. This is a unique opportunity for an investor to reposition the corner retail and contribute to the ongoing revitalization in San Francisco. As the City and rental market continue to improve, the new owner will capitalize upon this purchase at a low basis with immediate cash flow. Interested renters can message their phone number anytime.

craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Spacious 3rd Floor Master Bedroom with Private Bath + Stunning Oakland City View 6115 OLD QUARRY LOOP, Spacious 3rd Floor Master Bedroom with Privatebath, Oakland, CA 94605 1700.00 / Month 1 BEDROOMS | 1 BATHROOMS Interested? Fill out this form : https://renter.turbotenant.com/general-prescreener/T3duZXI6MTA3MDg5Mg==?property=2374366&source=cl Have questions? Contact the Landlord : https://rental.turbotenant.com/p/6115-old-quarry-loop-oakland-ca/c5eedc1a-27bf-40d3-9382-9c78d928a27d?source=craigslist Property Description: Spacious 3rd Floor Master Bedroom with Private Bath + Oakland City View Monte Vista Villas – Safe, Quiet Hill Location (East Oakland) $1,700/month + ~$150 utilities Looking for a calm, clean, and respectful home with some social energy? This is the largest and brightest room in the house — perfect balance of privacy and community. Room Highlights: Large master bedroom with high ceilings and tons of natural light Private bathroom with soaking tub overlooking the Oakland hills + city skyline (great for unwinding) Separate glass shower Two closets (including a deep walk-in) Furnished with queen bed, desk, and chair (or bring your own) House Vibe: Each floor has its own bedroom + bathroom → excellent privacy when you want it Shared kitchen, living room, and in-unit washer/dryer for easy socializing Currently 2 other quiet working professionals (mid-20s engineers). Low-drama, respectful, and friendly when you want company — but never a party house. Calm environment to recharge, but easy to chat or hang out in the common areas if you’re in the mood. Location & Lifestyle Perks: Right next to the freeway with easy access — reverse commute to Sunnyvale (usually 35–45 minutes, about 15 minutes shorter than from Berkeley) 1-minute walk to community gym + dog parks 10-min drive to Fruitvale BART + 3-min walk to AC Transbay bus (direct to SF) Close to hiking trails, Safeway, Trader Joe’s, Oakland Zoo, and Lake Merritt Ideal for a professional who wants a clean, drama-free home with good people and great amenities. Lease Terms: Minimum 6-month lease (longer preferred) Security deposit = 1 month’s rent Background & credit check required No smoking inside If this sounds like the right fit, reply with: Your name & age Preferred move-in date A bit about yourself (job, lifestyle, why you’re looking) I reply quickly and can usually set up a tour the same day or next. Serious inquiries only — thanks! craigslist.title: Located in Hayward, 1B/1B, Two Pools
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 27475 Hesperian Blvd, Hayward, CA 94545 Welcome to Glen Oaks Apartments! Rich with beauty and filled with the essential components of Bay Area modern culture. The breathtaking landscapes will astonish your ascetic impulses like no other place has before. With a touch of Spanish architecture, our community buildings are are unique. Each apartment comes with a vast amount of amenities ranging anywhere from gas appliances, dual access patios, and ceramic tile. Equipped with not one but two swimming pools and nine laundry rooms, our Hayward, CA, apartments for rent are a place where you can find everything you need. Sitting on seven acres gives you the serenity one needs at the end of a long day, while never forgetting the comfortable living benefits of being within arms reach of everything to fill your shopping needs. Our helpful staff is at your service to happily embrace any questions you may have during your tour. We are excited about meeting you and look forward to you joining our family of residents! craigslist.title: FURNISHED 2BED, 1BATH APT!!
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post FURNISHED RENTAL PROPERTY. Warm yet elegant, this Victorian home is tucked away on a quiet side street, offering tree-lined views of the Castro District, Market Street, Downtown, and the bay. The first floor features a welcoming foyer and a spacious living room bathed in natural light, complete with a wood-burning fireplace. Sliding glass doors open to a large deck that leads down to the private garden. The fully equipped modern kitchen includes a dedicated dining area with a wooden table and chairs. The upstairs level comprises a large bedroom with a king-size bed and a desk, accompanied by a full bathroom. The downstairs level offers a second bedroom with a queen-size bed, a desk, and a full bathroom. This lower level opens up directly to its own private deck with garden access. Interested renters can message their phone number anytime.

craigslist.title: Detached remodeled 3 bedrooms 2 baths home
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Gorgeous home tucked away on a quiet cul‑de‑sac in the highly desirable Serramonte neighborhood. This exceptional residence offers a spacious living room, formal dining room, and a beautifully remodeled granite kitchen featuring a gas stove, stainless‑steel appliances, and gleaming hardwood floors throughout. The home includes three bedrooms — including a comfortable primary suite — plus two additional bedrooms and two well‑appointed baths. Additional highlights include fresh interior paint, recessed lighting, and double‑pane windows throughout. The lower level offers convenient laundry, one indoor parking space, and an additional outdoor parking spot. The level backyard is ideal for outdoor entertaining, gardening, or simply relaxing. Perfectly located near Serramonte Center, King Plaza, and easy freeway access to 280 and 101, this home offers the ideal balance of suburban tranquility and urban convenience. Address: 257 Hampshire Ct. Daly City, Ca. 94015 For showing please contact Flora at show contact info
